success.title: UNSUBSCRIBED
success.body: You're off [{list}]. We won't send you emails from this list again unless you re-subscribe.

missing_token.title: BROKEN LINK
missing_token.body: This unsubscribe link is missing its token. Open the email and click the link directly, or write us at [{email}].

malformed.title: BROKEN LINK
malformed.body: This unsubscribe link is malformed. Email us and we'll remove you manually.

bad_signature.title: INVALID LINK
bad_signature.body: This link couldn't be verified. Email us and we'll remove you manually.

expired.title: LINK EXPIRED
expired.body: Unsubscribe links expire after 1 year. Email us and we'll remove you manually.

internal.title: SOMETHING WENT WRONG
internal.body: Try again in a minute, or email us and we'll remove you manually.
